items.title: [正面] Morimens is a bizarre combination of a card game, ...
items.summary:
Morimens is a bizarre combination of a card game, depression, and art. It took me only 20 minutes to realize that it’s something truly unique, and I adore it very much. Dark, weird, and incredibly metal.

All the gacha systems are in place, but they’re so generous that the only reason you’d want to spend money is to support the developers. This generosity almost resulted in a shutdown, but thankfully it was avoided.

My only "complaint" is the game’s budget. I appreciate that it’s free and doesn’t demand anything more, but I wish the developers had more resources. At the moment there’s little to no voice-over, the English translation needs some work, most characters only have a few static sprites, and the UI feels like an afterthought.

Can’t wait to see how it evolves over time!

items.title: [正面] Si, depresión... Y mucha. Vale la pena, mucho mas ...
items.summary:
Si, depresión... Y mucha. Vale la pena, mucho mas que CZN si buscas una historia mas madura y oscura. También encuentro mas entretenido el poder usar 4 personajes en lugar de solo 3.
No vale la pena jugar en español (de momento). Pero si en algún momento hacen la traducción manual como la de inglés actualizo la reseña.

PD: Conocí este juego gracias a la decepción que me dió chaos zero nightmare.

items.title: [正面] The game is looking fun and nice but to bad there ...
items.summary: The game is looking fun and nice but to bad there is no English audio but only Japan. I am very interested in following the story but i am tired of need to read all the text instead of listen, so decided to uninstall the game and hopefully come back when they implement English audio.
